known_issues: Current/deployed logo is not the originally uploaded one; user requests reverting to the original logo.

existing_features.title: Replace the currently used logo asset with the originally uploaded logo (the one provided earlier by the user) across the entire frontend by updating the centralized branding configuration and ensuring all logo renderings resolve to that original asset.

new_feature_requests.summary: Revert/apply the originally uploaded logo asset

projectName: Revert site branding to the originally uploaded logo asset
